title: Looking for Column type sample input for few of the column types

posts.author: prasmadd (prasmadd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Team,

We could able to find most of the column types sample payload from the column type reference documentation provided here - https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/guide-to-changing-column-data

Below are the column types for which there is no documentation:

  1. autonumber
  2. color-picker
  3. pulse-log
  4. pulse-id
  5. pulse-updated
  6. columns-battery
  7. team
  8. duration
  9. votes

Can you please provide sample payload for this column types. Thank you.

Regards,
Prashanth

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @prasmadd

Many of the columns listed are either read-only for the API or even not accessible through the API. See here for a list of those columns: https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/guide-to-changing-column-data. Missing from here is the column-battery which is not accessible either.

For other columns (like votes, duration, teams) I recommend to put them on a board through the UI and then query the column values with the API playground. That gives you the payload the column is expecting.

posts.author: oscar506 (Oscar Sanchez)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to get the available column types and shape with graphQL query, or are there types for typescript for the column types?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @oscar506,

Currently, our API does not offer this information
